file.content:
.PHONY: help build build-rust build-core build-cli build-rust-frontend build-examples build-ts build-go \
       test test-quick test-standard test-full test-e2e \
       clean lint walkthrough

# -- Build -------------------------------------------------------------------

build: build-rust build-ts build-go ## Build everything (Rust + TS + Go)

help: ## Show this help
	@grep -E '^[a-zA-Z_-]+:.*?## ' $(MAKEFILE_LIST) | \
		awk 'BEGIN {FS = ":.*?## "}; {printf "  \033[36m%-18s\033[0m %s\n", $$1, $$2}'

build-rust: build-core build-cli build-rust-frontend build-examples ## Build all Rust crates

build-core: ## Build shatter-core library
	cargo build -p shatter-core

build-cli: ## Build shatter CLI binary
	cargo build -p shatter-cli

build-rust-frontend: ## Build Rust frontend + runtime
	cargo build --manifest-path shatter-rust/Cargo.toml
	cargo build --manifest-path shatter-rust-runtime/Cargo.toml

build-examples: ## Build example targets (Rust + WASM generators)
	cargo build --manifest-path examples/rust/Cargo.toml
	cargo build --manifest-path examples/generators/wasm-rust/Cargo.toml
	cargo build --manifest-path examples/generators/wasm-adversarial/Cargo.toml

build-ts: ## Build TypeScript frontend
	cd shatter-ts && npm install --silent && npm run build

build-go: ## Build Go frontend
	cd shatter-go && go build ./...

# -- Test tiers (see CLAUDE.md) -----------------------------------------------

test: test-full ## Run full test suite (default)

test-quick: build ## Quick: cargo test only
	cargo test

test-standard: build ## Standard: cargo test + clippy
	cargo test
	cargo clippy -- -D warnings

test-full: build ## Full: all languages + clippy
	cargo test
	cargo clippy -- -D warnings
	cd shatter-ts && npm test
	cd shatter-go && go test ./...

test-e2e: build ## E2E: concolic pipeline tests only
	cargo test --test e2e_concolic

# -- Other --------------------------------------------------------------------

lint: ## Run linters (clippy + golangci-lint)
	cargo clippy -- -D warnings
	cd shatter-go && golangci-lint run ./...

walkthrough: build ## Run the demo walkthrough
	bash demo/walkthrough.sh --auto --delay 0

clean: ## Remove all build artifacts
	cargo clean
	rm -rf shatter-ts/dist shatter-ts/node_modules
	cd shatter-go && go clean ./...

content.content:
commit af3509c8a74798ec97e226abd03c8f36c401eda8
Author: Ketan Gangatirkar <33678+ketang@users.noreply.github.com>
Date:   Wed Mar 4 12:35:00 2026 -0600

    refactor: separate standalone examples from project examples
    
    Move self-contained source files (no external deps) into examples/standalone/{ts,go,rust}/
    so that `shatter scan` works on them without npm install or go mod download. Project
    examples (with package.json, go.mod, Cargo.toml) stay in their original dirs for
    dependency-requiring files.
    
    - Move 15 TS, 9 Go, 6 Rust standalone files to examples/standalone/
    - Change Go standalone files from package examples to package main
    - Update lib.rs to only declare external_deps and traits modules
    - Remove moved-file entries from .shatter/config.yaml files
    - Update walkthrough.sh paths to use standalone dirs
    - Update e2e_concolic.rs examples_dir() to point at standalone/ts/
    
    Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

content.text: Now I have a clear picture. Let me summarize and file the issues.

input.command:
bd create --title "shatter-ts build fails: react-component.tsx missing JSX config and @types/react" --priority P1 --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Problem

\`make test\` fails at the \`build-ts\` step because \`src/__fixtures__/react-component.tsx\` cannot compile:

1. **No \`jsx\` compiler option** in \`tsconfig.json\` — TSX files need \`"jsx": "react-jsx"\` or similar
2. **No \`@types/react\` dependency** — the fixture imports from \`react\` but no type declarations are installed

## Errors

```
src/__fixtures__/react-component.tsx(16,42): error TS2307: Cannot find module 'react' or its corresponding type declarations.
src/__fixtures__/react-component.tsx(28,12): error TS17004: Cannot use JSX unless the '--jsx' flag is provided.
```
(13 errors total)

## Root Cause

Commit 4ce7a8c added the React shim feature (str-sunh) including this fixture but didn't update tsconfig.json or package.json to support TSX compilation.

## Fix Options

1. **Add JSX support**: Add \`"jsx": "react-jsx"\` to tsconfig.json and \`@types/react\` to devDependencies
2. **Exclude fixtures from build**: Add \`src/__fixtures__\` to the \`exclude\` list in tsconfig.json (if fixtures don't need to be compiled)

Option 2 is simpler if the fixture is only used at test time by jest (which has its own ts-jest transform).
EOF
)"
input.description: File issue for TSX build failure

input.command:
bd create --title "shatter-ts tests reference deleted example files after standalone refactor" --priority P1 --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Problem

6 tests fail across 2 test suites (\`handlers.test.ts\` and \`executor.test.ts\`) because they reference \`examples/typescript/src/01-arithmetic.ts\` which no longer exists.

## Root Cause

Commit af3509c ("refactor: separate standalone examples from project examples") moved standalone TS files from \`examples/typescript/src/\` to \`examples/standalone/ts/\` but did not update the test file paths in \`shatter-ts\`.

## Failing Tests

- \`executor.test.ts\`: "reports plausible metrics for instrumented execution" — ENOENT on \`01-arithmetic.ts\`
- \`handlers.test.ts\`: 5 tests that analyze/instrument/execute real functions — all get "error" status because the example file can't be found

## Fix

Update the \`EXAMPLES_DIR\` or file paths in \`handlers.test.ts\` and \`executor.test.ts\` to point at \`examples/standalone/ts/\` instead of \`examples/typescript/src/\`.
EOF
)"

content.text:
Filed two P1 issues:

| Issue | Problem | Root Cause |
|-------|---------|------------|
| **str-qx1m** | TS build fails — `react-component.tsx` needs JSX config and `@types/react` | Commit 4ce7a8c added the fixture without updating tsconfig/package.json |
| **str-0ouc** | 6 TS tests fail — reference deleted `examples/typescript/src/01-arithmetic.ts` | Commit af3509c moved files to `examples/standalone/ts/` but didn't update test paths |

Both block `make test` at the `build-ts` step (str-qx1m) and at `npm test` (str-0ouc). Cargo tests, clippy, and Go tests all pass fine.
